action.reasoning: Observation: CLIP ViT-B/16 trained 4 epochs in 25min, val_macro_f1=0.0907 monotonically increasing. Pipeline works well. Best is ckpt at epoch 3. Analysis: 6.1h left, 26 iters. Val F1 still rising, can train longer. Should also: (1) submit eval with current best to verify, (2) continue training more epochs. Per epoch ~6min, so 8 more epochs = 48min. Should also fix predict.py — it currently uses model_name from ckpt, that's OK. Let me first submit eval on the current best to lock in a baseline, then train longer.
